# Extração: 04.02-140k Proposal

- **Fonte:** 04.02-140k Proposal.docx
- **Tipo:** DOCX
- **Tamanho:** 26.5 KB

---



Great talking with you this afternoon.



Based on our call…



Here are the different areas where I think I can assist with the launch of your new supplement offer… 



What You Need Help With…



Niche Selection

Figuring out the best niche to launch in. Something that provides you with the best chance of having a successful and profitable offer out of the gate, but that also has longevity. 



Product Selection 

Choosing a customized formulation that has ingredients that are high quality and backed by double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled trials. This is an integral part because we typically want at least one or two unique “star” ingredients that the market is not particularly aware of. We can’t choose a “commodity product” here. That would be a big mistake. 



Product Sourcing 

I can help you to get a high-quality, custom formulations on demand. This will save you a ton of money. I can connect you to the right people and help make sure you’re getting these formulations at a fair price. 



Merchant Processing

You have some options, but I’ve got additional recommendations as well and can help you avoid several pitfalls that I made early on. 



Sales Letter Creation 

This is me actually writing the letter. A lot of what you’re paying for here isn’t just for my great writing, but also the big ideas and hooks I come up with. Also my “AOV Money Close” - which will significantly increase your AOVs compared to if you have most other copywriters work on this project. Higher AOVs = more profitability on Day 1. 



Sales Letter Creation Part II

I think it’s worth us planning on having a second version of the sales letter that is specifically oriented towards FB Compliance. We should do this version second, after the initial one has been created. 



Funnel Design + Flow

All of the design work will be done by your team. But I can show you the funnels to model off of and what works for the front end, checkout, and upsells. 



Email Marketing and Data Monetization

I’m not going to write these emails. But I can advise on what needs to be created here for both content, automated re-orders, special sales, etc. I’ll map them out for you. I can also help with additional list monetization strategies by connecting you with the right affiliates – if you want to promote their offers to your list on a CPA basis. 



Traffic Strategy: 

Fine-tuning the acquisition strategy. I know you have some internal media buyers and I’d love for them to do the heavy lifting. But we can look at agency and affiliate options for FB too. I can also provide warm introductions to list-owners who can mail for the offer and help you to gather data. Plus, some of these list owners can drive pretty significant volume, so it’s not just about “data” but also making money. 



Initial A/B Testing

I’ll advise on some A/B Split Tests that we should run early on. Mostly around multiple leads + multiple headlines etc. But also things like price points, offer structure, positioning of ingredients, etc. 



Managing for Profitability

Giving you the model you need to accurately assess your profitability. Helping you understand what to plan for in terms of refunds, chargebacks, merchant fees, etc. Also once we’ve established a baseline profit margin, helping you find ways to expand the profit margin. 



Call Center Strategy

Inbound + Outbound + Welcome Calls + Partials and Declines. I have a conflict of interest here because I do own a call center and my recommendation is going to be that you use mine LOL. But even if you don’t use mine, I can still show you how you can be generating significant additional revenue by leveraging a call center. This is stuff that increasing your bottom line by another 10-20% - it’s vital and not enough people do it. So if you hire my Call Center that’s a separate agreement, but I’ll walk you through the key steps and provide an overview of what needs to be done regardless, that way you start enjoying a ton of “found” money right away. 



Additional Upsells and Product Creation/Selection

Once we’re rolling, we can figure out which additional products to put into your funnel as cross-sells, or through remarketing in emails. These additional products can also be sold to your new customers via the call center doing “welcome calls.” 



MISC

I’m sure there’s important stuff I’m not mentioning here, but that will come up as we’re working together. Stuff like how to avoid refunds/chargebacks, how to increase compliance and avoid regulatory trouble, the best CRM to use, etc. 



The Investment:



Okay so based on all of this, what does working together look like? 



There’s two parts…



Part I. Offer and Sales Letter Creation 



The first part is the investment for creating the entire acquisition package for you: 



Market Research

The big ideas and hooks

Unique Mechanism of the Problem and Solution

The Initial Sales Letter

The FB Specific Sales Letter

The Upsell and Downsell. 



Investment: $75,000

Turnaround Time: 8 Weeks



The Rationale For Why the Quote is What It Is:

I currently charge $60k for a new sales letter. We’re really looking at 1.5 sales letters because I do think it’s important that we have two different versions - the initial one, but also a second one that is more specifically geared towards FB. 



Also as a note, if we end up not needing to do the second version of the sales letter, I’m fine with either crediting the extra $15k towards consulting, or just refunding it. But I wanted to include it in the quote. 



Part II. Strategy and Consulting Over 3 Month Period



Includes…



Niche Selection

Product Selection 

Product Sourcing 

Merchant Processing

Funnel Design + Flow

Email Marketing and Data Monetization

Traffic Strategy: 

Initial A/B Testing

Managing for Profit

Call Center Strategy

Additional Upsells and Product Creation/Selection

MISC



I’m thinking the best way to approach this is to break this down into three months…



Month 1 Strategy and Consulting: 



Initial 120 minute kickoff call for launch strategy, niche selection, product selection, sourcing, merchant processing, etc. 



Plus, unlimited emails to me for any questions that arise, or if you need to bounce ideas off me, or get clarification from me (guaranteed 24 hour response time during weekdays). 



Investment: $20,000





Month 2 Strategy and Consulting: 



Second 120-minute launch strategy call around traffic strategy, data monetization strategy, funnel design + flow, call center strategy, etc. 



Plus, unlimited emails to me for any questions that arise, or if you need to bounce ideas off me, or get clarification from me (guaranteed 24 hour response time during weekdays). 



Investment: $20,000





Month 3 (Launch Month) Strategy and Consulting: 



4 one-hour long calls (one per week) focused reviewing numbers, optimizing traffic strategies, focusing on managing for profit, devising and implementing A/B tests, new product selection, creating additional upsells around new products, etc. 



Plus, unlimited emails to me for any questions that arise, or if you need to bounce ideas off me, or get clarification from me (guaranteed 24 hour response time during weekdays). 



Investment: $25,000







The Totals



Up Front Investment

Offer and Sales Letter Creation - $75,000

Month 1 Strategy and Consulting - $20,000

Total: $95,000 (Paid Up Front)



Month 2 Investment: 

Month 2 Strategy and Consulting - $20,000

Total: $20,000 (Paid at Start of Month 2)



Month 3 Investment: 

Month 3 Strategy and Consulting - $25,000

Total: $20,000 (Paid at Start of Month 3)



Grand Total For Investment Over Three Months: $140,000



Here’s Why You Should Say “Yes” to My Proposal.



Honestly, there are several million reasons…



But here are the two biggest…



Reason #1 I’m going to save you a TON of money.



You mentioned that your total budget for this project is $300,000…



And the total investment you’d be making in me and my services is $140,000…



Which comes out to just under half of your total budget. 



And here’s the thing…



By choosing to work with me…



I’m going to end up saving you a TON of money…



To the point where you probably won’t even get close to spending the total amount of $300k that you have allocated. 



Realistically you can expect to maybe spend another $60,000 MAX on design, dev, integrations, email copy, startup fees for various service providers, etc… 



Though it may actually be significantly lower. 



So yeah, paying me is going to take up half your budget over a three-month period…



But in exchange, I’m going to save you so much cash it’s crazy.



For example…



As mentioned previously, I can connect you with someone who will provide custom formulations on-demand. 



Doing this will saving you between $25,000 and $50,000 right out of the gate…



But it also eliminates the need for you to have cash locked up in inventory in the future too. 



As you scale, this will make a huge difference…



Because you’re able to actually put profit in the bank on Day 0…



Instead of needing to worry about reinvesting a big chunk of that profit into inventory.  



And here’s another example:



When I first started my company HLH in 2015, I used Stripe. It was going great, until Stripe decided they didn’t want to work with supplement providers…



And they locked up $200,000 of revenue for over three months.



That was devastating…



But it taught me the importance of having multiple merchant processing solutions…



Which is something I’m going to teach you about too…



That way you don’t end up in a situation where you’re trying to scale, but you suddenly can’t process payments…



And your extra cash flow is all out-of-reach, leaving you between a rock and a hard place. 



That’s just two examples…



There are legitimately dozens of mistakes I’ve made in the past, but that I can help you to avoid now…



And this will easily save you a healthy six figures over the next year…



Potentially millions…



All while keeping your cash flow free and clear. 



Reason #2 I’m going to make you a TON of money…



I know how to make health supplement offers and funnels highly profitable on Day 0…



And that’s very important…



Because typically when people start new health offers here’s what happens:



They’ve made a bunch of expensive mistakes pre-launch…



But then they do launch…



They start making some sales…



But they have no idea if their metrics are good or not.



With me, I can tell you if the metrics are good right away…



And if for some reason they aren’t, I can help you to optimize very quickly.



Plus, right out of the gate…



I’ll have your offer AOV sitting between $40 and $80 higher than you’d get by working with 99% of the other copywriters out there.



That’s a huge difference…



Because it means way more money in your pocket on Day 0. 



When you combine these two facts together…



It means that you can launch out of the gate at a 20-30% profit margin. 



If you do 100 sales per day at an average order value of $150…



That’s $15,000 a day in revenue…



And $3,000 to $4,500 per day in profit. 



Over the course of a month…



That leads to between $90,000 and $135,000 in net profit…



And remember, the total investment to work with me is $140,000…



So assuming you can get to 100 sales per day…



You’ll recoup your initial investment in less than two months. 



Now of course, will you do 100 sales a day the second you launch?



Maybe.



It might be that there’s a bit of a ramp up period…



But because I have so much experience scaling health offers…



The odds are pretty good that we can get you to at least 100 sales a day pretty fast…



Especially if your internal media buying team is solid…



But I’ve also got plenty of health-oriented external media buyers and list owners I can connect you with too. 



And if the offer is really a home run, which is certainly the goal…



Then realistically you could be doing several hundred sales per day…



Which is exactly what I’m doing right now for that weight loss offer I showed you the accounting for during our call. 



But let’s keep things more modest and conservative…



Let’s say you average 100 sales per day, at a $150 AOV and a 20% profit margin…



And that this is maintained for a 12 month period (very achievable). 



This means you’re netting $3,000 per day…



And over the course of 365 days…



That’s a net profit of $1,095,000. 



Not a bad ROI on a $140k investment right?



And of course this doesn’t even take into account data monetization from email marketing…



Or the call center…



Or anything else either. 



Plus, it doesn’t take into account the fact that you could very well be doing more like 200, or 300, or 400 sales per day…



Which would give you an ROI in a single month…



And potentially contribute millions of dollars to your bottom line. 



Some final thoughts…



Now I know this is super lengthy…



But honestly I was having so much fun writing this...



And I think the reason why it was so much fun…



Is because I just have so much damn expertise here. 



There are very few people on this planet who have more experience creating and scaling health supplement offers than I do. 



I have my own offers right now that are doing 7 figures a month at a high profit margin…



Plus, the offers I’ve written for clients are actively doing over $10MM a month on sources like Facebook, Native, Google, etc. 



So when you hire me…



You’re not just paying for a copywriter…



You’re paying for confidence and probability...



Because at the end of the day…



The odds of your venture being successful are just so much higher when you work with me…



Which is why I charge what I do…



And why I have the reputation that I have. 



Hopefully that all makes sense…



But feel free to let me know if you have any additional questions or thoughts. 



- Stefan
